REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., RECONSTRUCT COMPANY, N.A., BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFFS TO ALLEGE FACTS TO SUPPORT EACH CAUSE OF ACTION AND TO ADDRESS ALL ISSUES RAISED BY DEMURRER, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO RES JUDICATA, COLLATERAL ESTOPPEL AND STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. THE AMENDED COMPLAINT SHALL BE SET FORTH IN CLEAR AND CONCISE LANGUAGE. PLAINTIFFS SHALL HAVE 10 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE COURT NOTES THAT PLAINTIFFS' OPPOSITION WAS FILED/SERVED LATE AND WAS OVER THE PAGE LIMIT. FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH STATUTORY DEADLINES AND PROCEDURAL RULES IN FUTURE MAY RESULT IN MOTIONS BEING TREATED AS UNOPPOSED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-11-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., RECONSTRUCT COMPANY, N.A., BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

Appearances: Gary Evans and Diane Talley-Evans (415.946.9664) plaintiffs and responding parties appearing in propria persona; No other appearances.

Plaintiffs did not inform opposing counsel of their intent to appear. The Court does not hear argument and adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiffs to allege facts to support each cause of action and to address all issues raised by demurrer, including but not limited to res judicata, collateral estoppel and statute of limitations. The amended complaint shall be set forth in clear and concise language. Plaintiffs shall have 10 days from notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint. The Court notes that Plaintiffs' opposition was filed/served late and was over the page limit. Failure to comply with statutory deadlines and procedural rules in future may result in motions being treated as unopposed. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-12-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., RECONSTRUCT COMPANY, N.A., and BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. For a hearing date of July 12, 2017 the latest date for filing and serving by mail was June 14, 2017. Proof of service indicates filing and mail service on June 16, 2017. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)
